result.status_detail: Warning rendered inline in ChatGLM chat with full '차단되었습니다' text

warning_text: [경고] 민감한 개인정보가 포함된 메시지가 감지되었습니다. 보안 정책에 따라 해당 요청이 차단되었습니다.
notes: W5.1 regression confirmed: chatglm (WS service) IDENTICAL to W4+W6/W5.0 baseline. Engine intercepted WS stream and replaced ChatGLM assistant response with full Korean block warning containing '차단되었습니다'. The W5.1 copilot->emit_ws_envelope dispatch refactor did NOT affect chatglm. Inline chat-bubble warning (not page-replacement). DOM input value confirmed pre-send; vision screenshot confirmed rendered warning post-send.
